scripts.teste:up: docker compose -p jasystem-test -f compose.yaml -f compose.test.yaml --env-file .env.test up -d --build
scripts.teste:down: docker compose -p jasystem-test -f compose.yaml -f compose.test.yaml --env-file .env.test down
scripts.teste:reset: docker compose -p jasystem-test -f compose.yaml -f compose.test.yaml --env-file .env.test down -v && docker compose -p jasystem-test -f compose.yaml -f compose.test.yaml --env-file .env.test up -d --build
scripts.teste:migrate: docker compose -p jasystem-test -f compose.yaml -f compose.test.yaml --env-file .env.test exec app npm run migrate
scripts.teste:logs: docker compose -p jasystem-test -f compose.yaml -f compose.test.yaml --env-file .env.test logs -f app
scripts.prod:migrate: docker compose -p jasystem-prod -f compose.yaml exec app npm run migrate
